ohtani.title: Shohei Ohtani tallies five RBIs in Dodgers win
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani drives in five runs on two hits, a three-run double and two-run triple, in the Dodgers' 15-2 victory over the Angels

imanaga.title: Mike Yastrzemski hits go-ahead double in Braves' win
imanaga.blurb: Mike Yastrzemski comes up clutch with a go-ahead double in the 8th inning to back a lockdown bullpen performance in the Braves' 4-1 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Munetaka Murakami mashes two homers in White Sox win!
suzuki.blurb: Munetaka Murakami collects his first career multi-home run game in the White Sox 8-3 victory over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Willson Contreras hits go-ahead homer in Red Sox win
yoshida.blurb: Willson Contreras hits the clutch go-ahead home run in the 8th inning of the Red Sox 3-2 win over the Braves

okamoto.title: Daulton Varsho's clutch hit leads Blue Jays to win
okamoto.blurb: Daulton Varsho comes up clutch with a go-ahead single and Yohendrick Piñango hits his first career homer to lead the Blue Jays to a 2-1 win over the Tigers

murakami.title: Munetaka Murakami mashes two homers in White Sox win!
murakami.blurb: Munetaka Murakami collects his first career multi-home run game in the White Sox 8-3 victory over the Cubs

matsui.title: Luis Rengifo, Kyle Harrison lead Brewers in 7-1 win
matsui.blurb: Luis Rengifo drives in three runs and Kyle Harrison tosses five scoreless innings to lead the Brewers to a 7-1 win over the Padres
